title: Information Kingdom
subtitle: Crown Intelligence internal operating system
northStar: Turn Crown Intelligence into a premium AI systems business that compounds leverage through strategic execution, content, automation, and founder-grade operating discipline.

commandCenter.headline: Run the business like an operating system, not a scattered project.
commandCenter.body: The dashboard is the command surface for offer clarity, pipeline movement, delegation, memory continuity, and execution quality.
directives: Protect premium positioning over generic AI service noise.
Turn each build sprint into a sellable asset, proof point, or operating advantage.
Route work through agents with explicit ownership and next outputs.
Reduce founder-memory dependency by logging sessions, decisions, and reusable systems.

decisionPanel.label: Current sprint thesis
decisionPanel.value: Sharpen offer + tighten operating system + increase pipeline visibility

decisionPanel.label: Primary risk
decisionPanel.value: Strong brand shell without enough recurring acquisition and offer proof

decisionPanel.label: Next commercial milestone
decisionPanel.value: Consistent booked strategy calls from inbound + outbound motion
